name: prototype_set_document_property
description: Copy/open a prototype, set one writable string Document.Properties property, save, reopen, and verify persistence.

args.source_path: absolute .grb prototype path, optional when prototype_id is provided
args.prototype_id: catalog id, optional when source_path is provided
args.property_name: required writable string DocumentProperties property name
args.text_value: new property text, defaults to empty string
